rulings.Case Title: CYRUS LAFARRE VS. U.S. BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR WF et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 26, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. 1) Overrule, as to first, fifth and sxith causes of action; first doesn't point out deficiences prr CCP 1060; fifth and sixth not proper to challenge veracity. 2) Sustain with leave to amend as to second cause of action to allege tender or exemption; 3) Sustain with leave to amend as to the third, fourth and eighth causes of action to allege requisite specificity and damages; 4) Sustain without leave to amend as to the seventh cause of action, substitution of trustee was in compliance with CC 2934(a)(1), RNJ Exh B. = (501/REQ)
